data.title: Hong Kong Customs and the University of Hong Kong jointly organise a regional anti-money laundering capacity building workshop
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The "Regional Anti-Money Laundering Capacity Building Workshop: New Challenges in the Traditional and Digital Ages" co-organized by the Hong Kong Customs and the University of Hong Kong was held for four consecutive days from June 9th and ended successfully today (June 12th). Following the signing of a memorandum of cooperation at the International Forum on Combating Money Laundering and Transnational Organized Crime in December last year, the Hong Kong Customs and the University of Hong Kong held this workshop to further strengthen the Customs' capacity building work in combating money laundering, especially the trend of virtual assets and the risks they bring. It is reported that the Hong Kong Customs is working with the University of Hong Kong to develop a digital tool to track cryptocurrency transactions used in suspected money laundering schemes. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: WLFI official website adds Swap, lending and APP modules, but the functions are not yet open
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: WLFI official website has been updated, adding Swap, lending and WLFI APP modules. Currently, the above functions are still in the preview state and have not yet been officially launched.

data.title: Hong Kong Customs and University Collaborate on Anti-Money Laundering Workshop
data.description: According to Odaily, a workshop titled 'Regional Anti-Money Laundering Capacity Building: New Challenges in the Traditional and Digital Era' was held from June 9 to June 12, organized by Hong Kong Customs and the University of Hong Kong. This event follows the signing of a memorandum of understanding between the two entities at an international forum on combating money laundering and transnational organized crime in December last year. The workshop aimed to enhance the capabilities of customs officials in tackling money laundering, with a particular focus on the trends and risks associated with virtual assets. Hong Kong Customs is reportedly collaborating with the University of Hong Kong to develop a digital tool designed to track cryptocurrency transactions involved in suspected money laundering schemes.

data.title: LBank launches LBANK EDGE and sets up a $5 million ecological fund
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, LBank announced the official launch of LBANK EDGE, focusing on the value discovery and top liquidity support of cutting-edge assets, and is committed to becoming the "value portal" for users. LBANK EDGE can achieve spot and contract trading within 1 hour after the target appears. The special zone has been officially opened, and special activities have been launched to reduce initial trading risks.
At the same time, LBank has established a $5 million ecological fund to support the market expansion and ecological cooperation of high-potential projects, and jointly build a sustainable and win-win LBANK EDGE ecology.

data.description:

data.title: Bitcoin Price Faces Short-Term Correction: What Lies Ahead for BTC?
data.description:
The broader crypto market retreated today, with Bitcoin price dropping more than 1. 5%, indicating a cautious stance of traders. Notably, the plunge in the digital assets space comes amid a gloomy momentum recorded in the broader financial market and the US stock market ending its Wednesday session in the red

data.title: Goldman Sachs Lowers U.S. Recession Probability to 30% Over Next Year
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Goldman Sachs has revised its forecast for the likelihood of a U.S. economic recession within the next 12 months, reducing the probability from 35% to 30%. This adjustment reflects the financial institution's updated analysis of economic conditions and indicators.

data.title: Trident to raise $500 million to build XRP treasury
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Nasdaq-listed company Trident Digital Tech Holdings (Trident) plans to raise $500 million through various means such as issuing stocks, strategic placements and structured financing tools to establish an XRP treasury (expected to be launched in the second half of 2025), and appoint Chaince Securities LLC as a strategic advisor. The plan will focus on acquiring XRP tokens as long-term strategic reserves, deploying staking mechanisms to generate income, and deeply participating in the Ripple ecosystem. (Streetinsider)

data.title: Chainlink, JPMorgan Chase, and Ondo Finance Complete Cross-Chain Funds Settlement Trial
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Chainlink, JPMorgan's Kinexys and Ondo Finance have completed a cross-chain payment delivery (DvP) settlement test, enabling asset exchange between a licensed payment network and a public test network. The test involved Kinexys Digital Payments, a licensed network operated by JPMorgan Chase, and the Ondo Chain testnet, which focuses on the tokenization of real-world assets (RWA). CRE is an off-chain computing layer designed to support cross-chain interoperability of financial systems. In this transaction, the core asset is Ondo's tokenized U.S. Treasury bond fund OUSG, which is exchanged for payment through the Kinexys platform. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: US PPI rises 0.1% to 2.6% in May, lower than expectations
data.description:
The producer price index (PPI) in the United States ticked up 0. 1% in May, lifting the annual rate to 2. 6%, a slower climb than what analysts predicted, according to figures released Thursday by the Bureau of Labor Statistics. Economists surveyed by Bloomberg had expected a 0. 2% increase, but the monthly rise came in weaker. The […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/us-ppi-rises-0-1-to-2-6-in-may/

data.description:

Enhanced Cross‑Chain Connectivity: Leveraging decentralized oracles for secure transfer verification, the.

data.title: Suspected AEX founder Huang Tianwei arrested in Thailand for suspected 200 million baht crypto fraud
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to community user @chaoge_btc, Huang Tianwei, the suspected founder of the cryptocurrency trading platform AEX (An Yin Exchange), was arrested at Don Muang Airport in Thailand on suspicion of defrauding two Chinese nationals of approximately 200 million baht (approximately RMB 44 million) in crypto assets in Thailand. He has been handed over to the Chiang Rai police for further investigation.

data.title: ETH/USDT,BTC/USDT and SOL/USDT Lead Binance USD-M Perpetual Futures Market in Trading Volume Over the Past 24 Hours
data.description: According to Binance Futures data, over the past 24 hours, the ETH/USDT, BTC/USDT, SOL/USDT, 1000PEPE/USDT and XRP/USDT trading pairs led the USD-M perpetual futures market in trading volume.ETH/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 1.36, funding rate: 0.0100%.BTC/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 0.62, funding rate: 0.0062%.SOL/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 2.45, funding rate: 0.0054%.1000PEPE/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 2.43, funding rate: 0.0053%.XRP/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 2.60, funding rate: 0.0023%.
